calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-20-2007 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Mex Ruxton, Clerk Carla Amador, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Judy Carney is present.
Attorney, Steven Adair MacDonald appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Keith Garcia and Mark Cianci is present.
Attorney, George J. Gigounas, representing the defendants through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 1642 30th Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94122. The trial date of November 20, 2007 is vacated.
